Services

What we do

Every project has different demands. We tailor our approach to suit the brief, the budget, and the way you live or work.

Service One

A short summary of this service — one sentence that explains the value for the client.

Tile Roof Restoration

Professional tile roof restoration — deep clean, repoint, reseal, and recoat. Restores waterproofing, lifts curb appeal, adds years to your roof's life.

Read more

Service Two

A short summary of this service — one sentence that explains the value for the client.

Read more

Metal Roof Restoration

Colorbond and metal roof restoration — rust treatment, repainting, resealing. Restore your metal roof's appearance and weatherproofing.

Read more

Service Three

A short summary of this service — one sentence that explains the value for the client.

Read more

Roof Repairs & Maintenance

Emergency roof repairs, leak detection, tile replacement, gutter repairs. Fast response across Melbourne.

Read more

Gutter Services

Gutter replacement, gutter guard installation, and thorough gutter cleaning to protect your home from water damage.

Read more

Melbourne's trusted roof restoration specialists. Tile, metal, and gutter services backed by 15+ years experience and a 10-year workmanship guarantee.
